mcp.instructions: Airtho SharePoint document library tools. Use airtho_browse() with no arguments to list available drives. Use airtho_browse(drive_name, path) to navigate folders by name — no opaque IDs needed. Use airtho_search(query) to find files by keyword (defaults to Jobs drive). Use airtho_read(drive_name, path) to read file content. For follow-up calls on items returned by browse/search, pass the item_id instead of path. Drive names: Jobs, Quotes, Vendors, Standard Forms, Service, Resources, Documents.
